channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 sipeed/picoclaw (20873 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: sipeed

]]>

item.title: 🐹 rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI (1211 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: rudrankriyam

📝 Repository: rudrankriyam/App-Store-Connect-CLI

📄 Descrizione: Fast, scriptable CLI for the App Store Connect API. Automate TestFlight, builds, submissions, signing, analytics, screenshots, subscriptions, and more. JSON-first, no interactive prompts

🍴 Forks: 69

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-18T04:08:59Z

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: MiniCodeMonkey

item.title: 🐹 ValkDB/postgresparser (191 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ValkDB

📝 Repository: ValkDB/postgresparser

📄 Descrizione: ANTLR-based PostgreSQL query parser for Go. Extracts tables, columns, joins, CTEs, parameters, DDL actions, and full column-usage metadata from SQL into a structured IR.

🍴 Forks: 7
